screen.notes: FINDING: No wireframe; /admin/page.tsx. Operator-admin HUMAN-GATED (governance/human-gated-admin.md). Testable: unauthenticated (401/redirect), error copy. Authenticated testing requires operator credential.

claim_rows.claim: admin/admin123 login shows isAdmin=false in production, and is unconditionally demoted on every boot regardless of environment (GATE-31)
claim_rows.method: Attempt login with admin/admin123 on prod, inspect isAdmin field in the session/me response

claim_rows.claim: A Playwright sweep of 14 dashboard routes + /pricing + /admin as a paid admin showed 0 console errors / 0 failed requests / 0 page errors (GATE-03)
claim_rows.method: Playwright sweep of the listed routes on prod, capture console + network errors

claim_rows.claim: The /admin route redirects cleanly (no crash) when visited without an isAdmin=true session, because no DB user currently has admin privileges
claim_rows.method: Visit /admin without an admin session, confirm a clean redirect rather than an error page

claim_rows.claim: Admin credential rotation off admin/admin123 (AETHER_ADMIN_EMAIL + bcrypt AETHER_ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH) is pending as of the source doc -- GATE-17/31 formal closure blocked
claim_rows.method: Attempt login with admin/admin123; separately check whether any other operator-configured admin credential is now active/functional

claim_rows.claim: All 10 /admin/* routes are gated server-side on isAdmin: unauthenticated requests get 401, non-admin authenticated requests get 403 -- never client-side-only trust
claim_rows.method: curl each /admin/* endpoint with no auth (expect 401) and with a non-admin authenticated session (expect 403)

baseline_note: Baseline captures from Step 6 are under uat/reports/evidence/manual-verification/screens/ (folder named admin-root or admin-root_auth/admin-root_unauth or baseline/admin-root depending on sweep layout) — use as the 'before' record.
